message:
chore: update Cargo.lock for v0.2.14, remove ephemeral codex temp files

Cargo.lock:
  Bump all workspace crate versions from 0.2.13 to 0.2.14 in the
  lockfile. This covers 12 crates: mcp-agent-mail, mcp-agent-mail-cli,
  mcp-agent-mail-conformance, mcp-agent-mail-core, mcp-agent-mail-db,
  mcp-agent-mail-guard, mcp-agent-mail-search-core,
  mcp-agent-mail-server, mcp-agent-mail-share, mcp-agent-mail-storage,
  mcp-agent-mail-tools, and mcp-agent-mail-wasm. The Cargo.toml
  manifests were already bumped; this commit brings the lockfile into
  alignment.

.codex-tmp cleanup:
  Delete two leftover temp files created and abandoned by a prior
  Codex agent session inside .codex-tmp/.tmpxvG1lU/:
    - archive-root/projects/dst-proj/aliases.json (project slug alias
      fixture with former_slugs: ["src-proj"])
    - archive-root/projects/dst-proj/messages/m1.md (stub message
      fixture)
  These are ephemeral test artifacts with no runtime or build purpose.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
